text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, during the lead-up to Mejiro Ardan's
debut race, we're both making our way toward
the training track when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh my, isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant! Yaeno... you never fail to impress! Your running's looking even sharper than before!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Chiyono O, your running is a testament to
the enormity of your efforts. You have inspired
me to redouble my own resolve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Mejiro Ardan's gaze to see two
Umamusume engaging in friendly competition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of them is Sakura Chiyono O, a cheerful
student known for her sincere, hardworking
personality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other is Yaeno Muteki, a runner with the
composure of a seasoned martial artist.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And both racers are in the same year as Mejiro
Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
They're both so diligent in their training. I would
do well to follow their example.
choice_data_list: You're good friends with them, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes. They are very dear friends of mine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Especially Chiyono O. We're roommates, after all.
She often helps me prepare for my trips to and
from the hospital, and sometimes even visits me
there to keep me company.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're finally out of the hospital and can come to
school again! Congratulations, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan's words stir a memory of Sakura
Chiyono O greeting her at the academy gates
following her discharge from hospital...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Truly... I am indebted to her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ah! Ardaaan!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Are you about to start training right now too?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I am. My debut race is fast approaching, so I wish
to fit in some last-minute practice.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it's finally happening! I'm so
excited to race alongside you in the Twinkle
Series, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I feel the same as Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It will be my pleasure to compete against you as
your peer. But before that, I hope you'll allow me
to cheer you on during your debut race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...It's an honor to hear such things from you both.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I intend to give my all in my upcoming debut
race, even at the risk of my own life.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Given my physical condition, I'm sorry to say that
I can make no promises as to whether I'll be able
to run with you both.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now, if you'll excuse me, I'm going to begin
training. I hope to see you both soon...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, shall we begin?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I'm surprised at what Mejiro Ardan said,
she doesn't give me long to linger in shock, and I
quickly follow after her toward the track.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... ...My heart rate is stable, and I'm not experiencing any issues with my legs, so, for the next set...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her debut race approaching, Mejiro Ardan's
passion burns with greater intensity every passing
day. Today, again, she seems to be testing the
boundaries of her own limits...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Given my physical condition, I'm sorry to say that
I can make no promises as to whether I'll be able
to run with you both.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I thought I had at least a vague
idea of how much she puts on the line every time
she enters a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I never imagined she'd express her
determination so firmly, let alone to such close
friends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While wondering how Sakura Chiyono O and
Yaeno Muteki might have taken Mejiro Ardan's
words...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Um, Ardan's trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to trouble you in the middle of training, but
could I talk to you about something, please?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It's about Ardan, um...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I guess you would be confused since I just
came up to you out of the blue. Well, long story
short...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: There was this one period when Ardan was hospitalized a lot, and sometimes—and I do mean sometimes—there would be this vaguely lonely look on her face...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I noticed that look, she'd brush it off
with a giggle... But somehow, I just couldn't shake
off the feeling that she was always forcing herself
to smile, for my sake.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Recently, though, I've seen so many great big
smiles on her face! Way more than before! And
the determination she showed back there on the
training track was incredible too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that side of Ardan, I just couldn't contain
my happiness! And I thought to myself, I really
need to put in more effort myself!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...The cause of that change is you, Trainer. She's
like this because you've been there for her ever
since the tryout.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't cheer her up on my own. So, that's why I
wanted to thank you...
choice_data_list:
Sounds like you've really been looking out for
Ardan.

Sounds like you've really been looking out for
Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: W-well, if anything, she's the one who's been looking out for me! She's such a wonderful roommate and—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...I know Ardan has her doubts, but I believe in
her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I have faith that she'll ace her debut and be able
to race together with Yaeno and me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I have an inkling myself of just how profound her
feelings about racing are.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But it's not like I'm any less committed myself!
That's why, when we eventually compete
someday, I'm going to race with all I've got!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Especially for the Japanese Derby... There's no
way I'm letting anybody else win that!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...I'm sorry for going on such a long rant! I-I think
I'd better get going now! Thank you for lending
me your ear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even Mejiro Ardan's dear friends have absolute
faith in her ability to make it to the Twinkle
Series...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which means, as her trainer, I've got to work even
harder to make sure she meets their expectations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, at the training gym...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Phew! One last rep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Perfect. Next is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Given my physical condition, I'm sorry to say that
I can make no promises as to whether I'll be able
to run with you both.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That's what you said today. Still, I am positive...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Someday you will reappear before me, as a
mighty opponent to be overcome!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I have been sure of this since I saw you run at the
tryout that day.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
By the narrowest possible margin, it's Mejiro
Ardan! She's crossed the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gentlemen, your winner for the
tryout—give it up for Mejirooo Ardaaan!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I trembled at the sight of it. That 1,200-meter
stretch of dirt was by no means your
element—neither the distance nor the surface
worked in your favor—but you overcame it all and
emerged triumphant.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the way you ran, I sensed in you something
that I lacked... That obsession—that steeled
resolve!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Ardan. The raging fire that fuels your legs will
surely not sputter out after a lone debut race.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: If I am to be at my best when our clash comes...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Then I must train!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three racers' hopes connect in this quiet
moment—the still before the storm of Mejiro
Ardan's debut race!
